raw_consumer_statement:
I discovered two fraudulent transactions on XX/XX/XXXX ( as I recall ). Both were with XXXX 's at two different stores in Florida. I don't live in Florida. I immediately called Citibank upon this discovery and reported the transactions. They locked down my account and cancelled the card. I was able to cancel one of the transactions with XXXX, but the other one had already been closed out and the items picked up. 

I didn't hear anything back from Citi and a couple of months went by. I noticed the money had been charged back onto my card. Upon examining my online account more closely I noted some messages Citi had sent me that I missed asking for more information and showing what XXXX 's had sent back to them. They had closed my case due to lack of response. I had expected something to be mailed to me or a phone call, but that had not happened. I did get a letter later after the case was closed which apparently was delayed because of holiday traffic. Also, I work a lot of hours. I work XXXX hours a week at my day job and I run a XXXX XXXX XXXX outside of that. I had XXXX events in XXXX alone. 

I called them up after seeing it was closed. They said they would investigate further. The case didn't move after calling a couple of more times and it remained closed. I have emailed them several times. I emailed them a police report on XX/XX/XXXX. They still didn't take any action on the closed case. I called in again XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX XXXX. I was told they needed to cancel my new account number and log another case with fraud. I have not received any additional communication although at least now there is an open case. It has been sitting under investigation ever since meanwhile Citi is charging me 29.99 % interest for a fraudulent purchase I never made in the amount of {$770.00}. 

The person that committed this fraud according to XXXX 's lives at the store location where they committed the fraud. Furthermore, XXXX 's says they checked his ID and it was a valid government ID. You can clearly see this in the attached documents. This is what XXXX 's sent back to Citibank. Either they are incompetent or there is a fraud ring operating in the store and the staff is in on it. Clear cut case of fraud and I have submitted a police report stating as much. I don't understand what else there is here to investigate.
